title: coreosma sanguinea
intro: Coreosma sanguinea, also known as the bloody coreosma, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues. The plant's leaves and roots are rich in bioactive compounds that have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, providing various health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Coreosma sanguinea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
